scores.correctness_notes: Covers the core change/task model, CLI commands, API polling, and ops library auto-waiting correctly. However, misses the notices system (change-update notice, long-poll), the filtering endpoint (GET /v1/changes?select=in-progress), and misidentifies the wait endpoint HTTP method as POST instead of GET. Also omits the `ready` boolean field and task progress (done/total counters) from the change structure.
scores.hallucination_notes: The wait endpoint is listed as `POST /v1/changes/{id}/wait` but the gold standard specifies `GET /v1/changes/{id}/wait`. `PEBBLE_PERSIST=never` is mentioned but not in gold standard and may be fabricated. The detailed status values (Do, Doing, Undo, Undoing, Abort, Hold, Wait, Error) go beyond the gold standard and some may be inaccurate or fabricated.
